sellers_note: Introducing the 2026 Tesla Model Y Long Rangeâa sophisticated electric vehicle engineered to redefine your daily driving with advanced technology and refined comfort.- Premium Audio System- Memory seat- Power Liftgate- Heated steering wheel- Exterior Parking Camera Rear- Heated front seats- Heated rear seats- Vegan Leather Seat Trim- Ventilated front seats- Ventilated rear seats- Navigation System- Dual zone automatic temperature control- Lane Departure Warning System- Auto High-beam Headlights- Four wheel independent suspensionThe Model Y Long Range delivers 130 MPGe in the city and 115 MPGe on the highway, providing efficient performance that reduces your dependence on charging stations. Its dual electric motors and all-wheel drive system work seamlessly to offer responsive acceleration and precise control in virtually any driving condition. The one-speed automatic transmission delivers smooth, consistent power delivery without the complexity of traditional multi-gear systems.Comfort and luxury define the interior experience. The vegan leather seat trim pairs sophistication with sustainability, while memory seats and steering wheel positioning ensure every driver finds their ideal setup. Heated and ventilated front seats adapt to seasonal conditions, and heated rear seats extend premium comfort to all passengers. The heated steering wheel provides welcome relief during cold mornings, and automatic dual-zone climate control maintains your preferred temperature throughout the cabin.Advanced safety features work together to protect you and your passengers. Lane Departure Warning, Electronic Stability Control, and a comprehensive airbag system including front, side, and overhead protection provide multiple layers of security. Four-wheel disc brakes with ABS technology offer responsive stopping power, while four-wheel independent suspension ensures stability and comfort across various road surfaces.The Model Y Long Range is finished in silver, complemented by 19-inch Crossflow alloy wheels that balance performance with visual appeal. The power liftgate simplifies loading and unloading cargo, while the exterior parking camera rear assists with maneuvering in tight spaces. Rain-sensing wipers automatically adjust to changing weather conditions, contributing to both safety and convenience.Vehicle comes finished in silver with premium features throughout. The Model Y Long Range represents a thoughtful investment in modern electric mobility. We invite you to visit our showroom for a demonstration and experience how this vehicle meets the demands of contemporary driving. Faulkner Toyota treats the needs of each invididual customer with paramount concern. When purchasing a vehicle, you should have high expectations. We pride ourselves on exceeding those standards with each customer that steps into our showroom. The proof is in our reputation. We're a top rated Toyota Dealership on DealerRater with 1,500+ growing customer reviews. WE WANT YOUR TRADE!!
